title: Senior Software Engineer - Samsung R&D India Ventures Solutions - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Samsung R&D India Ventures Solutions - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Samsung R&D India Ventures Solutions, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Tiruchirappalli operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Samsung R&D India Ventures Solutions:
Samsung R&D India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Samsung R&D India Ventures Solutions!
